system.description: You sprout a pair of bat-like (or pterodactyl-like) wings out of your back. You may fly for short durations: 3 rounds per jaunt, at a speed of 20m per round in any direction. You will require a turn (10 minutes) of rest after each jaunt before you can fly again. Armor adapted to your shape costs x10 the normal cost. Finally, you suffer a -1 penalty to Reaction throws and social skill throws because of your unsettling deformity.
